name: Sidus Space Inc.
business: Sidus Space is an innovative space and defense technology company with core capabilities that include dual use satellite manufacturing & technology integration, AI products and services, space and defense hardware components and space-based data solutions. It serves customers such as NASA, the Department of Defense, SpaceX, and Blue Origin, and operates a vertically integrated manufacturing, assembly, integration, and testing facility on Florida's Space Coast.

exposures.sentence: Sidus Space is an innovative space and defense technology company with core capabilities that include dual use satellite manufacturing & technology integration, AI products and services, space and defense hardware components and space-based data solutions.

Sidus Space is an innovative space and defense technology company with core capabilities that include dual use satellite manufacturing & technology integration, AI products and services, space and defense hardware components and space-based data solutions.
Sidus has developed the Orlaith AI Ecosystem, integrating the FeatherEdge radiation-tolerant edge processor with the Cielo AI software suite.
Sidus has developed the Orlaith AI Ecosystem, integrating the FeatherEdge radiation-tolerant edge processor with the Cielo AI software suite.
LizzieSat (LS) is a modular, hybrid 3D-printed satellite architecture designed to support multi-mission deployments across LEO, GEO, cislunar, and lunar orbits.
Commissioned the Automatic Identification System (AIS) sensor on LS-3, confirming maritime domain awareness capability.

catalysts.sentence: Successfully launched LizzieSat-3 (LS-3) on March 14, 2025, aboard SpaceX Transporter-13 rideshare mission, marking the third satellite added to Sidus on-orbit satellite fleet.

catalysts.event: Appointment of Kelle Wendling to Board of Directors
catalysts.sentence: Elected Kelle Wendling, a seasoned aerospace and defense executive with more than three decades of leadership and government contracting experience, to the Board of Directors, effective January 1, 2026.
